title: The Drum Oracle
concept: A night-fire dance built from real hands on real drums — warm, collective, ritual movement rendered as elegant world-club sound, never as costume.
statement: Tribal house drums and hand percussion under deep house bass and cinematic pads — accordion and Portuguese guitar appear only as distant texture, respectful rather than decorative.
visualIdentity: Firelight on packed earth, hands on drum skin, smoke rising straight up in still night air, gold dust caught in motion-blur.
musicalStyle: Tribal house drums, hand percussion, frame drums, toms, congas/bongos, deep house bass, cinematic pads, accordion or Portuguese guitar as distant texture.
